mapper.insert: insert ignore into dy_capture_batch( batch_no, room_key, douyin_user_id, payload_type, source, live_room_name, page_url, request_url, queue_size, item_count, raw_payload, report_time ) values( #{batchNo}, #{roomKey}, #{douyinUserId}, #{payloadType}, #{source}, #{liveRoomName}, #{pageUrl}, #{requestUrl}, #{queueSize}, #{itemCount}, #{rawPayload}, sysdate() )

insert into dy_live_room( room_key, room_name, source, last_report_time, create_time, update_time ) values( #{roomKey}, #{roomName}, #{source}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update room_name = if(values(room_name) is null or values(room_name) = '', room_name, values(room_name)), source = ifnull(values(source), source), last_report_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select:
select room_id, room_key, room_name, source, status, remark, last_report_time, create_time, update_time from dy_live_room
and room_key like concat('%', #{roomKey}, '%')
and room_name like concat('%', #{roomName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by update_time desc, room_id desc
select room_id, room_key, room_name, source, status, remark, last_report_time, create_time, update_time from dy_live_room where room_key = #{roomKey} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into dy_live_room(room_key, room_name, source, status, remark, create_time, update_time) values(#{roomKey}, #{roomName}, #{source}, ifnull(#{status}, '0'), #{remark}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.select: select viewer_id from dy_viewer where sec_uid = #{secUid} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into dy_viewer( sec_uid, nickname, avatar, gender, first_seen_date, last_seen_date, create_time, update_time ) values( #{secUid}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{gender}, #{leadDate}, #{leadDate}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update nickname = values(nickname), avatar = values(avatar), gender = values(gender), last_seen_date = values(last_seen_date), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.update: update dy_viewer set nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, gender = #{gender}, last_seen_date = #{leadDate}, update_time = sysdate() where sec_uid = #{secUid}
mapper.insert: insert into dy_viewer_daily_lead( lead_date, room_key, douyin_user_id, live_room_name, viewer_id, sec_uid, nickname, avatar, create_time, update_time ) values( #{leadDate}, #{roomKey}, #{douyinUserId}, #{liveRoomName}, #{viewerId}, #{secUid}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update douyin_user_id = values(douyin_user_id), live_room_name = values(live_room_name), viewer_id = values(viewer_id), nickname = values(nickname), avatar = values(avatar), update_time = sysdate()

insert ignore into dy_viewer_comment( lead_id, viewer_id, lead_date, room_key, douyin_user_id, sec_uid, nickname, content, dedupe_key, match_type, source, page_url, captured_at, create_time ) values( #{leadId}, #{viewerId}, #{leadDate}, #{roomKey}, #{douyinUserId}, #{secUid}, #{nickname}, #{content}, #{dedupeKey}, #{matchType}, #{source}, #{pageUrl}, #{capturedAt}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update dy_viewer_daily_lead set has_comment = 1, comment_count = comment_count + 1, first_comment_time = ifnull(first_comment_time, #{capturedAt}), last_comment_time = #{capturedAt}, last_comment_content = #{content}, update_time = sysdate() where lead_id = #{leadId}

update dy_viewer_daily_lead l set has_comment = if((select count(1) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.lead_id = #{leadId}) > 0, 1, 0), comment_count = (select count(1) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.lead_id = #{leadId}), first_comment_time = (select min(c.captured_at) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.lead_id = #{leadId}), last_comment_time = (select max(c.captured_at) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.lead_id = #{leadId}), last_comment_content = ( select c.content from dy_viewer_comment c where c.lead_id = #{leadId} order by c.captured_at desc, c.comment_id desc limit 1 ), update_time = sysdate() where l.lead_id = #{leadId}

update dy_viewer_daily_lead set owner_id = null, owner_name = null, owner_assigned_time = null, update_time = sysdate() where owner_name is not null and owner_name != '' and status != 'ordered' and owner_assigned_time is not null and owner_assigned_time < date_sub(sysdate(), interval 24 hour)
mapper.select: select l.*, coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), l.room_key) as display_room_name from dy_viewer_daily_lead l left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = l.room_key where l.lead_id = #{leadId}
select * from dy_viewer_comment where lead_id = #{leadId} order by captured_at desc
select * from dy_viewer_follow_record where lead_id = #{leadId} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into dy_viewer_follow_record( lead_id, viewer_id, follow_content, follow_result, next_follow_time, operator_id, operator_name, create_time ) values( #{leadId}, #{viewerId}, #{followContent}, #{followResult}, #{nextFollowTime}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, sysdate() )
